container-core: w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8
grid-3: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 lg:gap-8
grid-4: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 lg:gap-6
btn-base: inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-xl font-bold transition-all duration-300 active:scale-95 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none
section-header: flex flex-col items-center gap-4 text-center max-w-2xl mx-auto mb-16
feature-card: cursor-pointer flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center gap-3 transition-all duration-300 transform hover:-translate-y-1
status-card-1: w-56 h-56 rotate-6 p-6 flex flex-col items-center justify-center animate-float-slow
bot-node: absolute -bottom-10 -right-10 p-4 flex items-center gap-3 animate-float-slow
hero-container: flex flex-col items-center w-full px-8 py-12 text-center
